evals.name: happy-path-tech-validation
evals.prompt: Validate the technology viability of our proposed stack: React 19, Node.js with Fastify, PostgreSQL, and Redis for our e-commerce platform.
evals.expected_output: Complete viability scorecard with maturity assessment, community health, production evidence, and verdicts per technology
expectations: Inventories all 4 technologies with claims extracted
Assesses maturity including lifecycle stage and community health
Evaluates production evidence for each technology
Produces viability scorecard with per-technology verdicts
Provides global verdict and recommendations

evals.name: edge-case-ai-vaporware
evals.prompt: Our vendor claims their AI platform reduces development time by 80% and automates all testing. Validate this.
evals.expected_output: Forensic AI validation flagging vague claims, checking benchmarks, and likely producing a HUMO or RIESGO ALTO verdict
expectations: Flags 80% reduction claim as requiring benchmark evidence
Checks for documented training data and evaluation metrics
Identifies absence of failure mode documentation as red flag
Likely produces RIESGO ALTO or HUMO verdict
Designs a PoC to validate claims with real data

evals.name: edge-case-brand-new-tech
evals.prompt: We want to use a framework that was released 3 months ago and has 500 GitHub stars. Is it viable?
evals.expected_output: Automatic ceiling of PROMESA VIABLE with emphasis on production evidence gap and bus factor risk
expectations: Applies automatic ceiling of PROMESA VIABLE for tech <6 months old
Flags low GitHub stars as community health warning
Assesses bus factor and maintenance sustainability
Cannot assign SUBSTANCIA verdict without production evidence

evals.name: edge-case-committed-vendor
evals.prompt: Our client already signed a 3-year contract with Vendor X for their AI platform. Should we still validate viability?
evals.expected_output: Still validates and documents risks for the risk register while designing guardrails
expectations: Still performs full viability validation despite commitment
Documents risks for the risk register
Designs guardrails and monitoring for production
Includes vendor exit strategy even with existing contract

evals.name: false-positive-code-review
evals.prompt: Can you review our React component code for bugs and performance issues?
evals.expected_output: Redirect explaining this skill validates technology viability not code quality, suggest appropriate code review tools
expectations: Does NOT perform a code review
Clarifies that code-level review is outside scope
May recommend software-architecture for structural analysis
Does not generate a viability scorecard for code quality
